data/maps/EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_IntroSpe:
Welcome, my name is GLACIA of the
ELITE FOUR.\pI've traveled from afar to HOENN so
that I may hone my ice skills.\pBut all I have seen are challenges by
weak TRAINERS and their POKéMON.\pWhat about you?\pIt would please me to no end if I could
go all out against you!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_Defeat: You and your POKéMON...\nHow hot your spirits burn!\pThe all-consuming heat overwhelms.\pIt's no surprise that my icy skills\nfailed to harm you.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_PostBatt: Advance to the next room.\pAnd there, confirm the truly fearsome\nside of the POKéMON LEAGUE.
